creator: ahze@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, Apr 2, 2008 at 3:12 AM, Keith Gaughan <keith.gaughan@gmail.com>
wrote:

> On 02/04/2008, Michael Johnson <ahze@freebsd.org> wrote:
>
> > I'm using the hda sound driver and I don't have this problem, can you
> send
> > us the output of "pkg_info -E gst\*" and your CFLAGS?
>
> Certainly. Here's the package list:
>

Nothing looks odd so far, can you send me the output of 'gst-inspect' and
do you have CPUTYPE set?


>

> gstreamer-ffmpeg-0.10.3

> I'm just using the regular CFLAGS: -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe,

> it.
